name: player_fantasy_points_from_plays year+week split yields per-week values, not the season total (executed-result parity)
description: Regression guard for the week-split bug where the fantasy-points stat CTE was grouped/joined by year only, so every per-week row showed the full-season total. Seed one player (pos ZZ) with rushing plays in two different weeks of 2023 (50 yds week 1, 80 yds week 2). With a year+week split the data-view must return one row per week with that week's points (5.00, 8.00) -- the pre-fix code returned the season total (13.00) repeated at every week, which the oracle's per-week GROUP BY would not match. Path-agnostic: asserts executed values, so it guards both the legacy with-builder and the aggregator path regardless of which generates the SQL.

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-FPWK-000903','Test','Fpwk','T.Fpwk','Test Fpwk','ZZ','ZZ','2000-01-01',2020,'ZZ')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h) VALUES (992001, 2023, 1, 'REG', 'ZZ', 'OP')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h) VALUES (992002, 2023, 2, 'REG', 'ZZ', 'OP')
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, bc_pid, rush_yds) VALUES (992001, 1, 2023, 1, 0, 'REG', 'RUSH', 'ZZ', 'TEST-FPWK-000903', 50)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, bc_pid, rush_yds) VALUES (992002, 1, 2023, 2, 0, 'REG', 'RUSH', 'ZZ', 'TEST-FPWK-000903', 80)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds,0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int,0) * 6), 2) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE bc_pid='TEST-FPWK-000903' AND year IN (2023) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL' GROUP BY week
